center.name: 特立尼达岛
center.summary: 特立尼达岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联60种鸟类，包括小穴䳍、美洲瘤鸭、Dark-billed cuckoo等60种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Brazil, is commonly observed in some large cities, such as São Paulo. It ranges from northern Mexico and Trinidad locally to southern South America, but has become extinct from many parts of its range, including all of northern and central Mexico except for a small area of Chihuahua

birds.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, the Guianas, Peru, Trinidad and Venezuela.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/hummingbirds/ |title=Hummingbirds |website=IOC World Bird List |version=v 12.2 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1=F

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Tobago, Trinidad, Venezuela, and possibly Grenada.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/hummingbirds/ |title=Hummingbirds |website=IOC World Bird List |version =v 12.2 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1= F

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Mexico, Central America, Trinidad, and all but the four southernmost countries of South America.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/hummingbirds/ |title=Hummingbirds |website=IOC World Bird List |version =v 12.1 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1= F
